---
title: 'Model-Observation Discrepancies in Arctic Moisture Intrusions: Causes and
  Pathways for Improved Simulation'
pagetitle: 2026-4-1-Ma2026 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2026
author: Weiming Ma, Nicole Feldl, Hailong Wang, Gang Chen, Sandro W. Lubis, Yun Qian
  and Bryce E. Harrop
venue: npj Climate and Atmospheric Science
venue_cit: <i>npj Climate and Atmospheric Science</i>, doi:10.1038/s41612-026-01400-0.
recommended_citation: 'Weiming Ma, Nicole Feldl, Hailong Wang, Gang Chen, Sandro W.
  Lubis, Yun Qian and Bryce E. Harrop, 2026: Model-Observation Discrepancies in Arctic
  Moisture Intrusions: Causes and Pathways for Improved Simulation, <i>npj Climate
  and Atmospheric Science</i>, doi:10.1038/s41612-026-01400-0.'
paper_url: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41612-026-01400-0
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Model-Observation Discrepancies in Arctic Moisture Intrusions: Causes and Pathways for Improved Simulation

*Published in npj Climate and Atmospheric Science, 2026*

**Recommended citation:** Weiming Ma, Nicole Feldl, Hailong Wang, Gang Chen, Sandro W. Lubis, Yun Qian and Bryce E. Harrop, 2026: Model-Observation Discrepancies in Arctic Moisture Intrusions: Causes and Pathways for Improved Simulation, <i>npj Climate and Atmospheric Science</i>, doi:10.1038/s41612-026-01400-0.

[Download paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41612-026-01400-0){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
